cli.name: skills-sync
cli.description: Sync local skills folders across multiple AI apps

commands.setup: Initialize config, create master directory and config.yaml
commands.import: Scan existing skills and import to master directory
commands.link: Create Junction symlinks for enabled apps
commands.watch: Start file watcher for auto sync
commands.health: Check all symlink status and output health report
commands.rollback: Rollback to a previous version (requires Git)
commands.list: List user-downloaded skills on this computer
commands.clone: Clone skills repo from GitHub and create links

options.skipConfirm: Skip all confirmations, auto-select latest version
options.app: Create link only for specified app

setup.title: Skills-Sync Setup
setup.gitRemotePrompt: Git remote URL (optional, leave empty to skip)
setup.enableWatchPrompt: Enable file watcher for auto sync
setup.nextStepHint: Next: run skills-sync import to import existing skills
setup.editModeHint: Edit mode: Press Enter to keep current value
setup.pathNotFoundHint: Run skills-sync app add to add apps, or edit apps[].skillsPath in config.yaml

start.title: Skills-Sync
start.configDamaged: Config file damaged. Please check config.yaml or run setup again
start.hasGithubPrompt: Do you have a GitHub repo for syncing skills?
start.githubUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid GitHub URL
start.dirExistsNotEmpty: Directory {path} exists and is not empty
start.cloneFailedHint: Check if the repo URL is correct, or manually clone then run skills-sync link
start.noSkillsHint: Please download skills first, recommended: skills.sh
start.fixLinkHint: Run skills-sync link to fix links
start.syncHint: Run skills-sync sync to sync to GitHub
start.localSkillsFound: Found {count} local skills not in repo

import.title: Scan Existing Skills
import.skillsHint: Skills are directories containing SKILL.md file
import.duplicateFound: Found {count} skills with same name, select version to keep:
import.masterDirNotExist: Master directory does not exist. Create it?
import.existingSkillsFound: Found {count} skills with same name in master:
import.nextStepHint: Next: run skills-sync link to create symlinks

link.title: Create Symlinks
link.masterDirNotExist: Master directory does not exist. Check masterDir in config.yaml
link.appListHint: Run skills-sync app list to see all apps
link.appNotInstalledHint: The AI app may not be installed or path is incorrect

sync.title: Git Sync
sync.gitEnableHint: Set git.enabled: true in config.yaml to enable Git sync
sync.masterDirNotExist: Master directory does not exist. Check masterDir in config.yaml
sync.autoPushDisabled: Auto push disabled. Run git push manually
sync.noRemoteConfig: No Git remote configured, skipping push
sync.remoteConfigHint: Set git.remote in config.yaml to enable push

health.title: App Status Check
health.masterDirNotExist: Master directory does not exist. Check masterDir in config.yaml
health.gitStatusEnabledNoRepo: Git status: Enabled but repo not initialized

errors.permissionDenied: Permission denied, please check file permissions
errors.networkError: Network error, please check your connection
